positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial adventure scene featuring a detailed astronaut floating within a nebula formed by glowing, swirling cosmic dust and pastel-colored nebulae. The astronaut is depicted in a clean, minimalist suit with chrome and matte white accents, holding a luminous, stylized planet in one hand. The composition is centered and highly contrasting, utilizing deep indigo and royal blue backgrounds contrasted with brilliant magenta, cyan, and gold highlights. The artwork should be suitable for screen printing on fabric, utilizing bold, clean lines and distinct color fields. Style: Neo-Psychedelic Minimalist vector art, highly graphic and bold. Composition: Central, symmetrical, clean silhouette focus. Lighting: Dramatic, originating from the cosmic glow. Aspect Ratio: Square, suitable for apparel print.
